underlying_goal: Generate executable phase plans (PLAN.md files) for phase 2 of a project roadmap using a structured workflow with research, planning, and verification
friction_detail: Plan checker found a missing file reference in Plan 02-03 which Claude fixed and re-verified successfully.
brief_summary: User triggered a structured plan-phase workflow for phase 2, and Claude successfully researched, planned, verified (fixing one blocker), and committed all planning documents.
